title: Create:Parachute
description: This mod adds a parachute to Sable
body:
# Create:Parachute
This mod adds a parachute to Sable , and in order to fit create:aerodynamics, it became an add-on for Create.

It adds 3 types of parachute blocks
![parachute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42d5da6399de1e10f6c0b65fa23c662f381ae3af.png)
![parachute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1097e1082f87ce250b70d385e62e297847579536.png)
![bigparachute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78b880c2c5c2367e677094c4c1882c4d8182ffbc.png)

# How to use it?
The parachute block can be right-clicked empty-handed to enter the UI, where you can configure the parachute's drag coefficient and roll damping coefficient, and also change the speed threshold for disconnecting the parachute at low speeds.

Redstone activates parachute deployment when the parachute is retracted.You can choose in the UI whether to reactivate the redstone to close the parachute when it deploys.

And you can Right-click the parachute with the dye in hand to change the color
![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e7ba0a6fd26cc8bd45c03c1ea6fde43cb4bf469.png)
